description: Quiznect AI quiz generation. User picks a topic, AI generates a quiz, user answers. Showcases LLM-driven content creation in a playful surface.

scenes.name: Tap Quiznect
scenes.narration: Quiznect turns any topic into a quiz, powered by AI.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Quiznect turns any topic into an AI-generated quiz.

scenes.name: Pick a topic
scenes.narration: Type any subject - here's space exploration.

scenes.name: Generate the quiz
scenes.narration: Generate - the AI writes a custom set of questions.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Generate and the AI writes the questions.

scenes.name: Show first question
scenes.narration: Read the question, pick the answer that fits.

scenes.name: Back to home
scenes.narration: Get mChatAI on the App Store today.
